sections.title: Apartment Rental
sections.subtitle: A conversation about viewing an apartment for rent

questions.question: Applicant name: _______
questions.explanation: The applicant's name is Jack Green.|申请者名字是Jack Green。

questions.question: Current address: 5 _______ Court
questions.explanation: He lives at 5 King Court.|他住在国王苑5号。

questions.question: Monthly budget: £_______
questions.explanation: His budget is up to 900 pounds per month.|他的预算每月最多900英镑。

questions.question: Property type: _______ bedroom
questions.explanation: He is looking for a one-bedroom apartment.|他在找一居室公寓。

questions.question: Which area does he prefer?
questions.explanation: He prefers to live near the university.|他更喜欢住在大学附近。

questions.question: Move-in date: _______ October
questions.explanation: He wants to move in on 1 October.|他想10月1日搬入。

questions.question: Does he have a guarantor?
questions.explanation: His father will act as guarantor.|他父亲将作为担保人。

questions.question: Employment status: _______
questions.explanation: He is currently a student.|他目前是学生。

questions.question: Viewing time: _______ PM Friday
questions.explanation: The viewing is scheduled for 2:00 PM Friday.|看房安排在周五下午2点。

questions.question: What is most important in the property?
questions.explanation: He prefers a furnished apartment.|他喜欢带家具的公寓。
